overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring a dark wooden house with a flashlight. The character moves through narrow hallways and furnished rooms before exiting into a foggy night, encountering a hostile figure, and wading through a flooded area with a white bridge.

small plant on windowsill near wooden chair
tall windows with heavy curtains showing dark outside

segments.scene_description: The character navigates narrow wooden hallways and a stairwell inside a dark house, using a flashlight to illuminate the traditional wooden interior. The environment is enclosed with no visible sky, featuring wooden railings, wall posters, and potted plants along the corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: furnished living rooms with wooden interior and musical instruments

events.description: entering larger furnished room from narrow corridor, space opens up
approaching glass exit doors with visible foggy outdoor light beyond

agents.ego_description: moving through furnished rooms with bookshelves and musical instruments, heading toward the building exit

notable_agents.action: humanoid figure rising from armchair as flashlight approaches, appearing hostile

entered.detail: tall dark wood bookshelf filled with books against wall
complete drum kit with bass drum visible in corner room

glass panel doors leading to exterior, showing fog outside

segments.scene_description: The character explores furnished interior rooms featuring wooden bookshelves, a writing desk, and a drum set. A hostile figure rises from an armchair as the flashlight approaches. The character continues toward glass exit doors where foggy outdoor light becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy outdoor park area with vintage street lighting

approaching hostile figure leaning against lamppost in the fog

agents.ego_description: exiting the house into foggy night and approaching a hostile figure illuminated by street lamp

segments.scene_description: The character exits the house into a foggy outdoor environment illuminated by vintage street lamps. A hostile figure stands leaning against a lamppost to the right. The area features wooden benches and sparse vegetation barely visible through the thick fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded park area with submerged path and white wooden bridge

events.description: entering shallow flood water, movement slows to wading pace
approaching white wooden bridge partially submerged in flood water

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep water in flooded area, sweeping flashlight across water surface and reeds

entered.detail: white painted wooden footbridge with decorative railings partially submerged in water
submerged ground with reflections of flashlight on water surface
tall grass and reeds growing in shallow flood water

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a flooded outdoor area with knee-deep water, illuminating the surface with a flashlight. Tall reeds emerge from the water as the character approaches a white wooden bridge that spans the flooded path, eventually passing underneath its arch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a dark wooden house into a desolate, flooded outdoor landscape. It begins by navigating narrow hallways and a stairwell, where a flashlight cuts through the gloom to reveal wooden railings and potted plants. As the camera moves into furnished rooms filled with bookshelves and a drum set, a hostile figure rises from an armchair before the view shifts toward glass exit doors that reveal a foggy exterior. The scene then opens into a misty night illuminated by vintage street lamps, passing a second hostile figure leaning against a post amidst sparse vegetation. Finally, the camera wades through knee-deep water and tall reeds, moving forward until it passes underneath the arch of a white wooden bridge.
